ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the faculty member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the faculty member was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the faculty member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentences" (
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence */,
  "content" TEXT /* The actual text content of the feedback sentence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentence was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback was collected online */,
  "student_star" INTEGER /* Star rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentence associated with the feedback */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being rated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bigrams" (
  "bigram_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bigram entry */,
  "bigram" TEXT /* The bigram (two-word phrase) extracted from the feedback */,
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentence the bigram comes from */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bigram was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bigram was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bigram_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bigrams_sentence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentence_id") REFERENCES sentences ("sentence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses_faculty" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course taught by a faculty member */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the faculty member in the course (e.g., Instructor, Teaching Assistant) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student providing the feedback */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating associated with the feedback */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being rated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating being analyzed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., sentiment score, analysis notes) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the feedback (e.g., 0.0-1.0) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_analysis_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, pie chart) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES feedback_analysis ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis being reported */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES feedback_analysis ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "enrolled_at" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being rated */,
  "student_star" INTEGER /* Star rating given by the student (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_ratings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
